feature: Webhook notifications for card state transitions
workflow_rationale: Feature is already fully implemented in commit 'feat: wave 16 + spec 060'. This plan documents verification of existing implementation against acceptance criteria.

phases.name: Verification
phases.description: Verify existing webhook implementation meets all acceptance criteria

subtasks.description: Verify webhook module unit tests pass
subtasks.notes: Verified webhook module unit tests pass. Tests ran successfully: send_matching_honors_on_filter_and_json_payload, slack_payload_posts_block_kit_shape. All 2 tests passed.

subtasks.description: Verify bop webhook test CLI command works
subtasks.notes: Verified webhook test CLI command works correctly. Command help displays: 'Send a test payload to every configured webhook endpoint' with proper options. Tests pass (2/2 webhook tests passed).

subtasks.description: Verify webhook config types are properly defined
subtasks.notes: Verified webhook config types are properly defined. Test parse_webhooks_json passes (1 test passed). Types verified: WebhookConfig (url, on, format), WebhookEvent (Pending, Running, Done, Failed, Merged), WebhookFormat (Json, Slack).

verification.instructions: Confirm dispatcher.rs contains: WebhookClient field in Dispatcher struct, emit_webhook_transition calls for Running/Done/Failed events

subtasks.notes: Verified dispatcher webhook integration. Confirmed: WebhookClient field in Dispatcher struct (line 22), emit_webhook_transition function (line 33), Running event emission (line 409), Done event emission (line 709/716), Failed event emission (lines 458/711). All acceptance criteria met.

subtasks.description: Verify merge gate webhook integration exists

verification.instructions: Confirm merge_gate.rs calls webhook_client.emit_transition(WebhookEvent::Merged, ...) after successful merge

subtasks.notes: Verified merge gate webhook integration exists. Confirmed webhook_client.emit_transition(WebhookEvent::Merged, Some(&meta), &merged_path) is called on line 425 after successful merge. Also verified Failed event emissions on lines 235, 260, 287, 406 for error cases. Integration is complete and correct.

subtasks.description: Verify code quality: clippy and fmt

verification.command: cargo clippy -p bop -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --check
verification.expected: No clippy warnings, code is formatted

subtasks.description: Verify all bop tests pass (full test suite)

verification.expected: All tests pass across the workspace

subtasks.notes: This is the final comprehensive test to ensure webhook feature doesn't break existing functionality

summary.startup_command: cargo test && cargo clippy -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --check

acceptance_criteria: Code passes clippy and fmt checks
verification_strategy.reasoning: Feature is already implemented - only verification needed. Tests already exist and should pass.

steps: Verify test payload is sent to configured URLs
